Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series West heads to Motown. Ryan Anderson brings the series points lead into round 16. However, the Koehler’s are looking for the hometown win debuting a special Avenger body, and the return of Northern Nightmare.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: Don't miss the freestyle action from the Raymond James Stadium, on January 22, 2005.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: The Monster Jam All-Star Challenge Friday show.
Video.title: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Image.alt: Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Video.summary: Ride along with Monster Jam as we rewind to the unforgettable World Finals freestyle debuts of past Rookie of the Year & Rising Star award winners! Witness the explosive runs the very year they clinched those prestigious titles.Catch a glimpse of the humble beginnings of drivers like Coty Saucier, Camden Murphy, Jamie Sullivan, and more. These are the moments that started it all!
Video.title: Rookie And Rising Star World Finals Freestyles Compilation

Image.alt: Rookie And Rising Star World Finals Freestyles Compilation
Rookie And Rising Star World Finals Freestyles Compilation
Rookie And Rising Star World Finals Freestyles Compilation

Video.summary: Don't miss all the freestyle action from the Gelredome, on September 26, 2010.
Video.title: GelreDome - Arnhem, Netherlands - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2011 season continues with racing action from Everbank Field, on February 26, 2011.
Video.title: EverBank Field - Jacksonville, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 10 of the Stadium Championship Series, at US Bank Stadium in Minneapolis, MN.
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Enjoy this throwback compilation of the best of the Superman monster truck!
Video.title: Superman Throwback Highlights Compilation

Video.summary: Don't miss the freestyle action from the Edward Jones Dome, on February 25, 2006.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East rolls into upstate New York as Tyler Menninga attempts to clinch his second straight series title, while JCB Digatron’s Tristan England and Megalodon’s Todd LeDuc attempt to block Grave Digger from the series win.
Video.title: JMA Wireless Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: Day 1 of the Monster Jam 2021 Stadium Championship Series continues at Camping World Stadium, in Orlando, FL.
Video.title: Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads to Minnesota as the battle for the series championship rages on between Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy and Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson. New contenders have emerged as Cole Venard tries to lead the Black Pearl to another event win and Mike Christensen looks to take Vendetta to back to back freestyle victories.
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2005 season continues with racing action from Alltel Stadium, on February 26, 2005.
Video.title: Alltel Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Racing

Video.summary: As the points series resumes, Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson looks to clinch the Red series title and secure a spot at World Finals XXII, while Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy makes one last stand to stay in the hunt and capture his first series championship.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA

Video.summary: It's time for some of the biggest racing action from The Dome in St. Louis on February 17, 2007.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Video.summary: Monster jam's 2010 season continues with racing action from the Edward Jones Dome, on February 6, 2010.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss all the racing action from the Georgia Dome, on January 10, 2004.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the Superdome in New Orleans, LA in the 2000 season.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the HHH Metrodome, on December 10, 2011.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Catch up with Monster Jam's awesome racing and freestyle action from the Georgia Dome in March of 2017!
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Atlanta Motor Speedway in Georgia hosts the third day of The Monster Jam 2021 Stadium Championship Series.
Video.title: Atlanta Motor Speedway - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Freestyle equals chaos- no rules or boundaries! Don't miss your favorite trucks and drivers in this awesome showing at the Metrodome in Minneapolis.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads to the Diamond City as Arena Championship Series East takes over the Mohegan Sun Arena. Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson has clinched the series, but can he keep the event championship from a surging Armando Castro in El Toro Loco? Find out when the east series roars into Wilkes-Barre, Pennsylvania.
Video.title: Mohegan Sun Arena - Wilkes-Barre, PA

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series East heads to MVP Arena in Albany, New York as Weston Anderson looks to keep the series points lead with Grave Digger. Will he take the overall event championship or will Jurassic Attack’s Dalton Widner or Scooby-Doo’s Linsey Read rise to the occasion.
Video.title: MVP Arena - Albany, NY

Video.summary: Monster Jam World Finals XXII continues with the crowning of two new World Champions in the Lucas Oil High Jump competition and Target Freestyle. See the action as the Monster Jam season concludes with the biggest event of the year from Nissan Stadium in Nashville.
Video.title: World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Image.alt: World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN
World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN
World Finals XXII - Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Video.summary: Round four of Monster Jam Fast Track storms into Angels Stadium in Anaheim, delivering the raw power and fearless competition of the Stadium Championship Series West. The stadium roars as elite drivers face off in high-stakes JCB Racing, technical Great Clips Skills challenges, and a gravity-defying Freestyle finale. Tension peaks during legendary head-to-head battles, including a fierce clash between rivals Grave Digger and Megalodon, as competitors push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit. With horsepower measured in the thousands and emotions pushed to the edge, this event is a masterclass in precision and mechanical mayhem.
Video.title: Angel Stadium, Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Tune in LIVE as Monster Jam rolls into Huntington Bank Field in Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026
Video.title: LIVE: Monster Jam from Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026

Image.alt: LIVE: Monster Jam from Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam from Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam from Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026
